prompt: A highly detailed anime illustration of a beautiful teenage schoolgirl sitting on a rocky lunar surface under a deep star-filled space sky, with a large glowing blue Earth dominating the upper right background. She has silver white hair, extremely long and flowing in the low-gravity breeze, styled with two rounded twin buns high on the sides of her head and long loose strands cascading around her body. Her face is obscured by a flat square censor block centered over the head, with no facial features visible. She wears a Japanese-style school uniform: a crisp white long-sleeve blouse, a dark navy sleeveless sweater vest, a teal-green ribbon bow at the collar, a short dark pleated skirt, white knee-high socks, and brown leather loafers. She is posed seated sideways on a rock with both legs extended toward the viewer, one hand resting behind her on the stone for support, creating a slightly low-angle composition that emphasizes her legs and hair. The scene is lit with dramatic cool moonlight and rim lighting from space, producing glossy highlights on her hair, clothing folds, and the dusty lunar rocks. In the distant mid-right background, include exactly 3 visible lunar base structures: a tall antenna tower, 1 dish-like communication unit, and 1 cylindrical installation. In the lower left foreground, include a curved metallic spacecraft or habitat rim partially entering the frame. Make the environment feel cinematic, serene, futuristic, and slightly melancholic, with ultra-detailed textures, sparkling dust particles, sharp linework, soft atmospheric glow, and premium polished anime key visual quality.
